title: Signal Event Schema
description: Standard schema for all signal events flowing through SMOrchestra n8n workflows. All platform-specific data should be normalized to this format before scoring and routing.

signal_type.description: Normalized signal type. Raw platform events should be mapped to these standard types.

contact_email.description: Primary contact email. Used as the dedup key across platforms.

contact_name.description: Contact full name. Optional but recommended for personalization.

company.description: Company name. Optional but needed for ICP fit scoring.

phone.description: Phone number in international format (e.g., +971501234567). Used for WhatsApp channel detection.

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL. Used for HeyReach enrollment eligibility.

signal_strength.description: Signal strength score. 1=weakest (email open), 10=strongest (reply, meeting booked). Applied by the scoring Function node.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signal was observed. Used for recency decay in scoring and 90-day staleness check.

metadata.description: Platform-specific metadata. Structure varies by source.

campaign_id.description: Source campaign ID (Instantly campaign, HeyReach campaign, etc.)

raw_event.description: Original event type string before normalization.

sequence_step.description: Which step in the sequence triggered this signal (1, 2, 3...).

content_url.description: URL of content that was engaged with (for link clicks, page views).

reply_text.description: Text of the reply (for reply signals). Used for sentiment analysis.

sentiment.description: Sentiment classification of reply. Applied by Claude API sentiment node.

sentiment_score.description: Numeric sentiment score from Claude API analysis.

enrichment_data.description: Clay enrichment results (company size, industry, funding, tech stack).

fit_score.description: ICP fit score calculated from enrichment data.

metadata.reply_text: This sounds interesting, can we schedule a call?
